name: saga-workspace
description: Postgres-backed workspace memory system for agentic work.

scripts.deps:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --wait
scripts.test:integration: node scripts/require-env.mjs SAGA_TEST_DATABASE_URL && vp test run apps/cli/src/init.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/database.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/raw-session-import.postgres.test.ts
scripts.verify:integration: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.verify:unit: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:unit
